name: Front
description: Front is a collaborative inbox platform that unifies email, SMS, chat, and social messages into shared team inboxes. Use it to manage conversations, assign teammates, tag threads, and maintain a centralized contact database.

capabilities.name: conversations_list
capabilities.description: List conversations across all inboxes with filtering.

capabilities.name: conversations_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific conversation by ID.

capabilities.name: conversations_create
capabilities.description: Create a new discussion conversation.

capabilities.name: conversations_update
capabilities.description: Update a conversation's status or properties.

capabilities.name: conversations_assignee_update
capabilities.description: Assign or reassign a conversation to a teammate.

capabilities.name: conversations_tags_update
capabilities.description: Add or replace tags on a conversation.

capabilities.name: messages_list
capabilities.description: List all messages in a conversation.

capabilities.name: messages_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific message by ID.

capabilities.name: messages_reply
capabilities.description: Send a reply to an existing conversation message.

capabilities.name: contacts_list
capabilities.description: List all contacts in the Front address book.

capabilities.name: contacts_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific contact by ID.

capabilities.name: contacts_create
capabilities.description: Create a new contact with handle and name.

capabilities.name: contacts_update
capabilities.description: Update a contact's name, description, or custom fields.

capabilities.name: contacts_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a contact by ID.

capabilities.name: inboxes_list
capabilities.description: List all inboxes in the workspace.

capabilities.name: tags_list
capabilities.description: List all tags available in the workspace.

capabilities.name: tags_create
capabilities.description: Create a new tag.

capabilities.name: teammates_list
capabilities.description: List all teammates in the workspace.

capabilities.name: teammates_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific teammate by ID.

capabilities.name: comments_list
capabilities.description: List all internal comments on a conversation.

capabilities.name: comments_create
capabilities.description: Add an internal comment to a conversation.

capabilities.name: accounts_list
capabilities.description: List all company/customer accounts.

capabilities.name: accounts_create
capabilities.description: Create a new company/customer account.

capabilities.name: analytics_export_create
capabilities.description: Create an analytics data export for reporting.

capabilities.name: message_templates_list
capabilities.description: List all message templates (canned responses).

capabilities.name: events_list
capabilities.description: List recent events (messages, assignments, tags).
